_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: VoiceSentinel Processor
author: panda@pandadevv.dev
description: VoiceSentinel voice processing backend using Faster Whisper for transcription
startup: bash -lc 'set -e; export TMPDIR=$HOME/tmp PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR=1 PIP_PROGRESS_BAR=off; mkdir -p $TMPDIR tmp; SRC=.vs_src; rm -rf $SRC; if git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/jackh54/voicesentinel.git $SRC 2>/dev/null; then rm -rf app; cp -r $SRC/processor-voicesentinel/app ./app; cp $SRC/processor-voicesentinel/requirements.txt ./requirements.txt; rm -rf $SRC; echo Updated app from repo.; else rm -rf $SRC; echo Update skip no git.; fi; [ -d venv ] || python3 -m venv venv; . venv/bin/activate; python -m pip install -U pip setuptools wheel -q; python -m pip install --extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu -r requirements.txt -q; [ -d app ] && [ ! -f app/__init__.py ] && :> app/__init__.py || true; exec python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${SERVER_PORT} --workers 1'

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /mnt/server

apt-get update
apt-get install -y ffmpeg opus-tools curl git
rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone to temp dir; copy to root; remove clone (no voicesentinel folder at root)
SRC=".vs_src"
rm -rf "$SRC"
git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/jackh54/voicesentinel.git "$SRC"

rm -rf app
cp -r "$SRC/processor-voicesentinel/app" ./app
cp "$SRC/processor-voicesentinel/requirements.txt" ./requirements.txt
if [ -f "$SRC/processor-voicesentinel/config.example.json" ] && [ ! -f config.json ]; then
  cp "$SRC/processor-voicesentinel/config.example.json" ./config.json
elif [ ! -f config.json ]; then
  echo '{}' > config.json
fi
rm -rf "$SRC"

mkdir -p models tmp
if ! grep -q '/home/container/.local/bin' .profile 2>/dev/null; then
  echo 'export PATH="/home/container/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> .profile
fi

echo "Install complete."
